expectations.evidence: Report uses sections (CRITICAL ISSUES, WARNINGS, POTENTIAL DUPLICATES, SUMMARY & NEXT STEPS) with subsections, SQL code blocks, and structured lists rather than free-form text.
Section 'Invalid Modalities' identifies 2 listings with non-canonical values: 'energy healing' and 'Trauma Informed Services', noting these won't appear in search filters.
Multiple SQL sections provided: queries to find bad contact info, modality replacement example, sessions scripts with UPDATE statements and example geocoding.

Report does not provide a structured field completeness summary with percentages. It mentions missing bios (224 listings) and missing photos (385 listings) in narrative form but does not provide a heatmap or percentage table for all fields across practitioners and centers separately.

Section 'POTENTIAL DUPLICATES' identifies 10 groups of duplicates with phone matches, website matches, and specific examples including malamaponomassage.com (3 listings), massagebook.com (3-4 listings), and others.
Report correctly distinguishes 'bio' for practitioners and 'description' for centers when discussing field completeness issues.
